identity.project_summary: Collaborative project with Virtanen Lab based on a single-center, prospective cohort trial (ISRCTN91953024) of 258 women under 31 years old with CIN2 managed with active surveillance and followed for up to 24 months. The project aims to identify spatial TME and transcriptomic differences between progressive, regressive, or persistent lesions. 67 biopsies from 60 patients were selected (15 quick regressors in 1 year, 15 slow regressors in 2 years, 30 non-regressors, plus 3 matched invasive carcinoma progressions). Integrates multi-pass t-CycIF proteomics (Ella/Naipunya/Saundarya) and GeoMx spatial transcriptomics. Implements cell segmentation via Oskari Lehtonen's pipeline, Tribus cell calling, spatial Recurrent Cellular Neighborhoods (RCN) mapping (DBSCAN/spatial count at 100um), spatial LDA, and correlates cell type proportions with clinical outcomes, HPV high-risk/low-risk types (including HPV16 status), and E4 viral replication relocation status.
identity.responsible: Ella Anttila (Anni Virtanen, Oskari Lehtonen, Saundarya Shah, Zhihan Liang, Kaiyang Zhang, Anniina Färkkilä, Naipunya Guruprasad)
